'''ngajudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnonotid|pycnonotid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-j-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnonotid|pycnonotid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngajudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæjidith|ngæjidith]] || [[word:ngæjidij|ngæjidij]] || [[word:ngæjidish|ngæjidish]] || [[word:ngæjidi|ngæjidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngajujuduth|ngajujuduth]] || [[word:ngajujuduj|ngajujuduj]] || [[word:ngajujudush|ngajujudush]] || [[word:ngajujudu|ngajujudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngajuduth|ngajuduth]] || [[word:ngajuduj|ngajuduj]] || [[word:ngajudush|ngajudush]] || [[word:ngajudu|ngajudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngajufduth|ngajufduth]] || [[word:ngajufduj|ngajufduj]] || [[word:ngajufdush|ngajufdush]] || [[word:ngajufduf|ngajufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngajuduthu|ngajuduthu]] || [[word:ngajuduju|ngajuduju]] || [[word:ngajudushu|ngajudushu]] || [[word:ngajuduku|ngajuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngajuduth|ngajuduth]] || [[word:ngajuduj|ngajuduj]] || [[word:ngajudush|ngajudush]] || [[word:ngajudu|ngajudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngajuduthul|ngajuduthul]] || [[word:ngajudujul|ngajudujul]] || [[word:ngajudushul|ngajudushul]] || [[word:ngajudukul|ngajudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngajuduthuthu|ngajuduthuthu]] || [[word:ngajudujuju|ngajudujuju]] || [[word:ngajudushushu|ngajudushushu]] || [[word:ngajuduku|ngajuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngajuduthun|ngajuduthun]] || [[word:ngajudujun|ngajudujun]] || [[word:ngajudushun|ngajudushun]] || [[word:ngajudukun|ngajudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngajuduthuoro|ngajuduthuoro]] || [[word:ngajudujuoro|ngajudujuoro]] || [[word:ngajudushuoro|ngajudushuoro]] || [[word:ngajudukuoro|ngajudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
